forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KW266J4AJCJH9HM4DYFJRK09
+- 01KW267C7WHM0ETTDY64V1SDVY
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: b680
+project: expect
+title: Tier 2 tolerance bands (embedding cosine + numeric + Levenshtein)
+---
+## What
+Add the middle rung of the verdict ladder: tolerance bands that decide a criterion the deterministic tier couldn't, before any model call. Per `ideas/expect.md` §"The Verdict Ladder" Tier 2 and §"How outcomes get validated" (2).
+
+- In `crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/evaluate.rs`:
+  - Tier 2 resolution for criteria not decided by Tier 1: embedding cosine similarity vs the golden anchor (pinned embedder, default threshold 0.80 from config / `similarity_threshold` override), numeric tolerance, and Levenshtein for near-string matches.
+  - Reuse the project's embedder seam (the `EmbedderFactory`/`TextEmbedder` used by review — `tools/review/review_op.rs` `default_embedder_factory`; pin the embedding model per config `[embedder]`). The embedder checkpoint is recorded in the golden (reproducibility).
+  - Compare-by-tier: tolerance ⇒ golden's score + band; drift if the score leaves the band.
+- Gate: Tier 2 only runs on the residual Tier 1 couldn't decide; it short-circuits before Tier 3.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] A criterion that exact-match would fail but is semantically equivalent (cosine ≥ threshold) passes at Tier 2.
+- [ ] A numeric value within tolerance passes; outside drifts.
+- [ ] Tier 2 runs only after Tier 1 is undecided (assert ordering); the pinned embedder/threshold come from config and are recorded in the golden.
+- [ ] A score that leaves the golden's band is reported as drift, not a hard fail.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/evaluate.rs` Tier-2 tests with a stub/deterministic embedder: equivalent-reword passes, numeric tolerance, band-exit drift.
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-expect tier2` passes.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd`. Use a deterministic stub embedder in tests to avoid GPU/model flakiness.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,6 +1,26 @@
 ---
 assignees:
 - claude-code
+comments:
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kw3wd0qxayrzvcw6frene1v4
+  text: |-
+    Implemented Tier 2 tolerance bands in crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/evaluate.rs (TDD: 10 new tests written + watched RED at todo!() stubs, then GREEN).
+
+    Design:
+    - New `TextEmbedder` trait (sync `embed(&str) -> Vec<f32>`) is the evaluate-layer embedder seam — abstract, never hard-coupled to a concrete model. Production wiring adapts review's EmbedderFactory/model_embedding::TextEmbedder; tests pass a deterministic StubEmbedder (text->fixed vector map + call counter) and a PanicEmbedder. No GPU/model in unit tests; expect crate gains no model-embedding dependency.
+    - `ToleranceBand` enum: Semantic{threshold} (embedding cosine), Numeric{tolerance} (absolute), NearString{threshold} (normalized Levenshtein). Each carries its own frozen cutoff.
+    - `ToleranceAssertion` { checkpoint, locator, anchor: BoundValue, band, criterion_text } mirrors CompiledAssertion for Tier 1; `resolve(observation, &dyn TextEmbedder)` replays vs the frozen golden anchor.
+    - Compare-by-tier: in band => pass with score; score leaves band => tolerance drift (pass=false, score kept Some, TOLERANCE_DRIFT_REASON prefix) — distinct from Tier 1 hard fail (Some(0.0)) and structural drift (None / STRUCTURAL_DRIFT_REASON when locator unbinds/checkpoint gone).
+    - `evaluate_tiered(observation, &[CompiledAssertion], &[ToleranceAssertion], embedder)` = ladder: Tier 1 first (never touches embedder), then Tier 2 residual, stops before Tier 3.
+    - `similarity_threshold(spec, config)` = per-expectation override else [embedder] default (0.80). Embedder/threshold pinned in golden already via GradingPins (ledger).
+    - Helpers cosine_similarity / levenshtein_similarity (+ levenshtein_distance) named, with unit tests.
+    - Exported from lib.rs.
+
+    Verify: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-expect` 163 passed (1 pre-existing leaky drive test, unrelated). Tier2/evaluate/tolerance filter: 22 passed. `cargo check --workspace` ok. `cargo clippy -p swissarmyhammer-expect -- -D warnings` clean. `cargo fmt` applied.
+
+    Note: did NOT touch ledger.rs tolerance_drift stub or wire ops to a real embedder (out of scope — production embedder wiring requires the async model-embedding dep; Tier 3 task builds on evaluate_tiered).
+  timestamp: 2026-06-27T06:31:18.013333+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KW266J4AJCJH9HM4DYFJRK09
 - 01KW267C7WHM0ETTDY64V1SDVY
